title: selaginella phiara
intro: Selaginella philippinensis, also known as Selaginella phiara, is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella phiara include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Selaginella phiara can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
